activities.title: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove Morning Walk
activities.description: Experience the soaring emerald bamboo stalks in zen stillness before morning crowds arrive.

activities.title: Traditional Kaiseki Lunch near Tenryu-ji
activities.description: Savor meticulously prepared seasonal Japanese dishes highlighting tofu and Kyoto root vegetables.

activities.title: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion) Reflection
activities.description: Marvel at the top two floors covered in gold leaf reflecting beautifully across the Kyoko-chi Mirror Pond.

days.dateLabel: Day 2 - Fushimi Inari & Gion Geisha District

activities.title: Fushimi Inari Shrine Torii Gate Hike
activities.description: Hike through thousands of vermilion torii gates winding up the sacred Mount Inari.

activities.title: Nishiki Market Street Food Grazing
activities.description: Sample fresh takoyaki, matcha sweets, and skewered seafood along Kyoto's historic kitchen street.

activities.title: Twilight Stroll through Gion & Hanamikoji Street
activities.description: Wander preserved wooden machiya lanes with a chance to spot geiko and maiko heading to evening appointments.

activities.title: Kiyomizu-dera Wooden Stage & Views
activities.description: Visit the UNESCO wooden temple jutting out over hillside cherry and maple trees.

activities.title: Authentic Matcha Tea Ceremony experience
activities.description: Learn the zen art of preparing and serving powdered green tea inside a tranquil tatami room.

activities.title: Pontocho Alley Riverside Dinner
activities.description: Dine on grilled yakitori and sake in a narrow atmospheric lantern-lit alley overlooking the Kamo River.
